---
name: Release To-Do
about: Create a tracker for tasks related to a release
title: '[Release] ship version {major.minor.patch}'
labels: enhancement
assignees:

---

### Version Release Tasks

- [ ] Assign sub-issues for the release (**Planning**)
- [ ] Complete all sub-issues for the release (**In-Progress**)
- [ ] Create version release and version tag (**Implemented**)
- [ ] Push update with IT administrator (**Deployed**)
- [ ] Observe Triage Timeline (**Triaged**)
